title: cassia clarensis
intro: Cassia clarensis, also known as the Yellow Cassia, is a flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cassia clarensis are thought to include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and providing antioxidant protection. Cassia clarensis can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, as well as being dried and used in capsules or tinctures.
